channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vance enters the media lion's den
item.description: Vice President Vance is stepping into hostile media territory to defend the White House, using a strategy that previously won him support.

item.title: DNC officers required to sign NDAs amid financial struggles
item.description: The Democratic National Committee required its leadership to sign non-disclosure agreements before a meeting on party finances, according to sources.

item.title: Trump's anger leads to reversal of ICE vehicle stop pause
item.description: A furious President Trump complained to advisers about DHS's decision to pause vehicle stops, leading to a reversal of the policy late Tuesday.

item.title: AI leaders unite in push for urgent regulation
item.description: The three leading AI developers—Demis Hassabis, Sam Altman, and Dario Amodei—agree that frontier AI needs to be regulated as soon as possible.
